name: AreaMassProperties
summary: Contains static initialization methods and allows access to the computed metrics of area, area centroid and area moments in closed planar curves, in meshes, in surfaces, in hatches and in boundary representations.

methods.name: CentroidCoordinatesPrincipalMoments
methods.signature: public bool CentroidCoordinatesPrincipalMoments(out double x, out Vector3d xaxis, out double y, out Vector3d yaxis, out double z, out Vector3d zaxis)
methods.summary: Calculates the eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the moments matrix with respect to centroid coordinates.

methods.name: CentroidCoordinatesPrincipalMomentsOfInertia
methods.signature: public bool CentroidCoordinatesPrincipalMomentsOfInertia(out double x, out Vector3d xaxis, out double y, out Vector3d yaxis, out double z, out Vector3d zaxis)
methods.summary: Calculates the principal moments of inertia and principal axes with respect to centroid coordinates.

methods.name: Compute(Brep)
methods.summary: Computes an AreaMassProperties for a brep.

returns.doc: The AreaMassProperties for the given Brep or null on failure.

methods.name: Compute(Curve)
methods.summary: Computes an AreaMassProperties for a closed planar curve.

returns.doc: The AreaMassProperties for the given curve or null on failure.

methods.name: Compute(Hatch)
methods.summary: Computes an AreaMassProperties for a hatch.

returns.doc: The AreaMassProperties for the given hatch or null on failure.

methods.name: Compute(IEnumerable<GeometryBase>)
methods.summary: Computes the Area properties for a collection of geometric objects. At present only Breps, Surfaces, Meshes and Planar Closed Curves are supported.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: Objects to include in the area computation.

returns.doc: The Area properties for the entire collection or null on failure.

methods.name: Compute(Mesh)
methods.summary: Computes an AreaMassProperties for a mesh.

returns.doc: The AreaMassProperties for the given Mesh or null on failure.

methods.name: Compute(Surface)
methods.summary: Computes an AreaMassProperties for a surface.

returns.doc: The AreaMassProperties for the given Surface or null on failure.

methods.name: Compute(Curve, Double)
methods.signature: public static AreaMassProperties Compute(Curve closedPlanarCurve, double planarTolerance)
methods.summary: Computes an AreaMassProperties for a closed planar curve.

params.name: planarTolerance
params.doc: absolute tolerance used to insure the closed curve is planar

returns.doc: The AreaMassProperties for the given curve or null on failure.

methods.name: Compute(Brep, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static AreaMassProperties Compute(Brep brep, bool area, bool firstMoments, bool secondMoments, bool productMoments)
methods.summary: Compute the AreaMassProperties for a single Brep.

params.name: firstMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area first moments, area, and area centroid.

params.name: secondMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area second moments.

params.name: productMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area product moments.

returns.doc: The AreaMassProperties for the given Brep or null on failure.

methods.name: Compute(IEnumerable<GeometryBase>, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static AreaMassProperties Compute(IEnumerable<GeometryBase> geometry, bool area, bool firstMoments, bool secondMoments, bool productMoments)
methods.summary: Computes the AreaMassProperties for a collection of geometric objects. At present only Breps, Surfaces, Meshes and Planar Closed Curves are supported.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: Objects to include in the area computation.

params.name: firstMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area first moments, area, and area centroid.

params.name: secondMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area second moments.

params.name: productMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area product moments.

returns.doc: The AreaMassProperties for the entire collection or null on failure.

methods.name: Compute(Mesh, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static AreaMassProperties Compute(Mesh mesh, bool area, bool firstMoments, bool secondMoments, bool productMoments)
methods.summary: Compute the AreaMassProperties for a single Mesh.

params.name: firstMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area first moments, area, and area centroid.

params.name: secondMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area second moments.

params.name: productMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area product moments.

returns.doc: The AreaMassProperties for the given Mesh or null on failure.

methods.name: Compute(Surface, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static AreaMassProperties Compute(Surface surface, bool area, bool firstMoments, bool secondMoments, bool productMoments)
methods.summary: Compute the AreaMassProperties for a single Surface.

params.name: firstMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area first moments, area, and area centroid.

params.name: secondMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area second moments.

params.name: productMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area product moments.

returns.doc: The AreaMassProperties for the given Surface or null on failure.

methods.name: Compute(Brep, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public static AreaMassProperties Compute(Brep brep, bool area, bool firstMoments, bool secondMoments, bool productMoments, double relativeTolerance, double absoluteTolerance)
methods.summary: Compute the AreaMassProperties for a single Brep.

params.name: firstMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area first moments, area, and area centroid.

params.name: secondMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area second moments.

params.name: productMoments
params.doc: true to calculate area product moments.

params.name: relativeTolerance
params.doc: The relative tolerance used for the calculation. In overloads of this function where tolerances are not specified, 1.0e-6 is used.

params.name: absoluteTolerance
params.doc: The absolute tolerancwe used for the calculation. In overloads of this function where tolerances are not specified, 1.0e-6 is used.

returns.doc: The AreaMassProperties for the given Brep or null on failure.

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.summary: For derived class implementers. This method is called with argument true when class user calls Dispose(), while with argument false when the Garbage Collector invokes the finalizer, or Finalize() method.You must reclaim all used unmanaged resources in both cases, and can use this chance to call Dispose on disposable fields if the argument is true.Also, you must call the base virtual method within your overriding method.

params.name: disposing
params.doc: true if the call comes from the Dispose() method; false if it comes from the Garbage Collector finalizer.

methods.name: Finalize
methods.summary: Passively reclaims unmanaged resources when the class user did not explicitly call Dispose().

methods.name: WorldCoordinatesPrincipalMoments
methods.signature: public bool WorldCoordinatesPrincipalMoments(out double x, out Vector3d xaxis, out double y, out Vector3d yaxis, out double z, out Vector3d zaxis)
methods.summary: Calculates the eigenvalues and eigenvectors of moments matrix in world coordinates.

methods.name: WorldCoordinatesPrincipalMomentsOfInertia
methods.signature: public bool WorldCoordinatesPrincipalMomentsOfInertia(out double x, out Vector3d xaxis, out double y, out Vector3d yaxis, out double z, out Vector3d zaxis)
methods.summary: Calculates the principal moments of inertia and principal axes with respect to world coordinates.

properties.name: Area
properties.summary: Gets the area solution.

properties.name: AreaError
properties.summary: Gets the uncertainty in the area calculation.

properties.name: Centroid
properties.summary: Gets the area centroid in the world coordinate system.

properties.name: CentroidCoordinatesMomentsOfInertia
properties.summary: Moments of inertia with respect to centroid coordinate system. X = integral of ((y-y0)^2 + (z-z0)^2) dm Y = integral of ((z-z0)^2 + (x-x0)^2) dm Z = integral of ((z-z0)^2 + (y-y0)^2) dm where (x0,y0,z0) = centroid.
properties.remarks: What is meant by "moments of inertia" varies widely in textbooks and papers. The values returned here are the integrals listed in the Summary section. Some applications may want the values from WorldCoordinatesSecondMoments instead of the values returned here.

properties.name: CentroidCoordinatesMomentsOfInertiaError
properties.summary: Uncertainty in centroid coordinates moments of inertia calculation.

properties.name: CentroidCoordinatesProductMoments
properties.summary: Product moments with respect to centroid coordinate system.

properties.name: CentroidCoordinatesProductMomentsError
properties.summary: Uncertainty in product moments with respect to centroid coordinate system.

properties.name: CentroidCoordinatesRadiiOfGyration
properties.summary: Radii of gyration with respect to centroid coordinate system. X = sqrt(integral of ((y-y0)^2 + (z-z0)^2) dm/M) Y = sqrt(integral of ((z-z0)^2 + (x-x0)^2) dm/M) Z = sqrt(integral of ((z-z0)^2 + (y-y0)^2) dm/M) where (x0,y0,z0) = centroid.
properties.remarks: What is meant by "radii of gyration" varies widely in textbooks and papers. The values returned here are the integrals listed in the Returns section.

properties.name: CentroidCoordinatesSecondMoments
properties.summary: Second moments with respect to centroid coordinate system. X = integral of (x-x0)^2 dm Y = integral of (y-y0)^2 dm Z = integral of (z-z0)^2 dm where (x0,y0,z0) = centroid.

properties.name: CentroidCoordinatesSecondMomentsError
properties.summary: Uncertainty in centroid coordinates second moments calculation.

properties.name: CentroidError
properties.summary: Gets the uncertainty in the centroid calculation.

properties.name: WorldCoordinatesFirstMoments
properties.summary: Returns the world coordinate first moments if they were able to be calculated. X is integral of "x dm" over the area Y is integral of "y dm" over the area Z is integral of "z dm" over the area.

properties.name: WorldCoordinatesFirstMomentsError
properties.summary: Uncertainty in world coordinates first moments calculation.

properties.name: WorldCoordinatesMomentsOfInertia
properties.summary: The moments of inertia about the world coordinate axes. X = integral of (y^2 + z^2) dm Y = integral of (z^2 + x^2) dm Z = integral of (z^2 + y^2) dm.
properties.remarks: What is meant by "moments of inertia" varies widely in textbooks and papers. The values returned here are the integrals listed in the Summary section. Some applications may want the values from WorldCoordinatesSecondMoments instead of the values returned here.

properties.name: WorldCoordinatesMomentsOfInertiaError
properties.summary: Uncertainty in world coordinates moments of inertia calculation.

properties.name: WorldCoordinatesProductMoments
properties.summary: Returns the world coordinate product moments if they were able to be calculated. X is integral of "xy dm" over the area Y is integral of "yz dm" over the area Z is integral of "zx dm" over the area.

properties.name: WorldCoordinatesProductMomentsError
properties.summary: Uncertainty in world coordinates second moments calculation.

properties.name: WorldCoordinatesRadiiOfGyration
properties.summary: Radii of gyration with respect to world coordinate system. X = sqrt(integral of (y^2 + z^2) dm/M) Y = sqrt(integral of (z^2 + x^2) dm/M) Z = sqrt(integral of (z^2 + y^2) dm/M)
properties.remarks: What is meant by "radii of gyration" varies widely in textbooks and papers. The values returned here are the integrals listed in the Returns section.

properties.name: WorldCoordinatesSecondMoments
properties.summary: Returns the world coordinate second moments if they were able to be calculated. X is integral of "xx dm" over the area Y is integral of "yy dm" over the area Z is integral of "zz dm" over the area.

properties.name: WorldCoordinatesSecondMomentsError
properties.summary: Uncertainty in world coordinates second moments calculation.
